title: Dogfood: one real gather through config-resolved cli slot (closes decision 0019 first-dogfood)
action: Per plan.md 2A-iv shape: resolve resolveTier(root,'review','codex',{for:'gather'}) and run the returned command VERBATIM via Bash — prompt on stdin, nothing appended. The prompt demands a read-only gather (read 2-3 named repo files by absolute path, answer 2 factual questions) with the answer wrapped in <<<BEE_DIGEST ... BEE_DIGEST>>> delimiters. Capture stdout, extract the digest between delimiters. GO = non-empty, factually correct digest between delimiters; NO-GO = empty/garbled/no delimiters. Record the run verbatim (command as resolved, prompt, raw stdout head/tail, extracted digest, verdict) in .bee/spikes/advisor-and-orchestration/2aiv-cli-gather-dogfood.md. No source edits; spike output only.

truths: the command executed is byte-identical to the config-resolved command (echoed in the record)
the prompt travelled on stdin, nothing was appended to the command
GO/NO-GO verdict recorded verbatim with the raw evidence
decision 0019's pending first dogfood is closed by a logged decision citing the spike record
